title: Site Manager
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

ATELIER TANG (PTE.) LTD. Our company is The Premier Provider of Office Design and Construction Services which embodies the 21st century design and construction firm that embraces our ever-changing landscape and is constantly challenging design conventions. We enhance our core divisions in design, M&E, Project management and construction by capitalising on our combined experience spanning hundreds of projects. We love connecting, creating and make things happen! Does it sounds like you? We’re interested in meeting anybody who could bring something exceptional to our firm as part of the team. Working here will CHALLENGE you to lead, award you when you do.

  • URL: http://www.ateliertang.com

Job Summary

Manage and supervise daily site operations for interior renovation and design & build projects, ensuring compliance with design specifications, safety regulations, and project schedules while coordinating cross-functional teams and stakeholders to deliver quality outcomes.

Responsibilities

  • Lead daily site operations to execute works according to approved drawings, specifications, and project schedules
  • Coordinate and oversee subcontractors, suppliers, and site workers to ensure timely and quality delivery of tasks
  • Enforce compliance with workplace safety, health, and environmental regulations on site
  • Monitor project progress and proactively resolve site issues or delays to maintain schedule adherence
  • Conduct site meetings and communicate progress updates to Project Manager and management teams
  • Implement quality control measures for workmanship and materials to meet project standards
  • Plan and deploy site activities and manpower efficiently to optimize resource utilization
  • Verify and endorse site measurements, materials delivery, and work completion for accuracy and completeness
  • Maintain accurate site records, reports, and documentation to support project tracking and audits
  • Liaise effectively with consultants, clients, and authorities to address site-related matters and approvals
  • Uphold good housekeeping and site discipline to ensure a safe and organized work environment

Required competencies and certifications

  • Possession of relevant safety certification (where applicable)

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Diploma or Certificate in Interior Design, Building, Construction Management, or related field
  • Minimum 3-4 years of experience managing interior renovation or design & build projects
  • Familiarity with interior works processes, materials, and finishing details
  • Basic knowledge of M&E coordination including electrical, plumbing, and air-conditioning systems
  • Ability to read and interpret interior design and shop drawings accurately
  • Proficiency in site documentation and reporting to support project management
  • Strong coordination, communication, and problem-solving skills to manage multiple projects independently
  • Familiarity with site safety requirements specific to renovation works
